headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and major callouts. Tracking should be tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, navigation, and data tables. High legibility focus.

usage_rules: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Primary Blue (#2563eb) is for 'Active' states and 'Call to Actions' ONLY. Do not overuse.
Use 'Slate 900' (#0f172a) for all main text to ensure high contrast.
Backgrounds should be stark white or very pale slate (#f8fafc) to maintain the 'Clinical' look.

rules: Hero sections must be asymmetric (Text Left / Visual Right or vice versa).

buttons.style: Sharp corners (rounded-sm) or minimal radius (rounded-md). No pill shapes.
buttons.classes: font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase text-sm px-8 py-4

cards.hover: Border color darkens to Slate-400, no massive shadow lift.

navigation.style: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md, bg-white/80), sticky top-0 z-50, 1px bottom border.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on solid backgrounds to prevent 'digital flatness'.

motion.scroll_reveal: Elements should fade in and move up (y: 20 -> y: 0) as they enter the viewport.

3d_elements.usage: Hero section ONLY. A slow-rotating abstract molecule or crystal structure. Keep it minimal and monochromatic (Silver/Blue).

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons. Use thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) for elegance.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. SETUP THEME: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors defined above.
3. BUILD LAYOUT: Create a 'Layout' component that includes the Sticky Glass Header and the Footer.
4. HERO SECTION: Implement the Hero with the 'Tetris Grid' - Text on left, 3D/Image on right.
5. PRODUCTS: Use a grid layout for the product catalog. Do not use a simple list.
6. FORMS: Use Shadcn Form components for the Inquiry modal. Style them with the 'Sharp' aesthetic.
7. TESTIDS: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
